channel.title: Microsoft Service Health Tracker — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Microsoft 365 service health incidents — tracked and searchable

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may be unable to remove blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be experiencing high latency when performing searches in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be experiencing high latency when performing searches in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may not receive results when performing searches in SharePoint Online
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may not receive results when performing searches in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Microsoft OneDrive] Users may not be able to load the search bar in Microsoft OneDrive
item.description: [Microsoft OneDrive] Users may not have been able to load the search bar in OneDrive.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may not have been able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Some users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop device policy assignments
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop specific policy assignments.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft 365 Copilot usage reports
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may have seen stale data in some Copilot usage reports.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users in North America may be unable to access Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to access Copilot.

item.title: [Azure] Azure incident affecting East US
item.description: [Azure] Between 11:30 UTC on 24 April and 00:15 UTC on 25 April 2026, customers may have experienced failures or delays when attempting to provision, scale, or update resources in East US. Beyond this, a smaller subset of impacted customers may have experienced intermittent connectivity issues on existing workloads (including Virtual Machines and Azure Virtual Desktop sessions) for scenarios dependent on unhealthy internal service dependencies. The issue initially began with impact to a subset of custom

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Some users in East US may experience latency in Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Users may have experienced latency in Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to view analytics for SharePoint Online sites
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may have been unable to view analytics for SharePoint Online sites.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submission
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submission

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to create or edit agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to create or edit agents in Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may experience issues accessing or using Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Affected users may have been unable to use Copilot services and features.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may see a delay in certain Microsoft Copilot usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have seen a delay in certain Copilot usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may see a delay in certain reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have seen a delay in certain reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Admins may be unable to create new policies or edit existing compliance policies through Microsoft Purview
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Admins were unable to create new policies or edit existing compliance policies through Microsoft Purview.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access Microsoft 365 web-based services correctly when using Google Chrome
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access Microsoft 365 web-based services correctly when using Google Chrome.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users may be unable to access the Microsoft Intune web app from a managed Microsoft Edge iOS browser
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users may be unable to access the Microsoft Intune web app from a managed Microsoft Edge iOS browser.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may see delays when accessing Microsoft 365 Copilot Suggested Notebooks
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have seen delays when accessing Copilot Suggested Notebooks.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins' search parameters may have been missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Admins may be unable to progress mailbox migrations in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins may have been unable to progress mailbox migrations in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Universal Print] Some users may be intermittently unable to create some printer shares in Universal Print
item.description: [Universal Print] Users may be intermittently unable to create some printer shares in Universal Print.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users may be unable to access the Microsoft Intune web app from a managed Microsoft Edge iOS browser
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users may have been unable to access the Microsoft Intune web app from a managed Microsoft Edge iOS browser.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Admins may have experienced failures when running admin operations the admin portal in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins may have experienced failures when running admin operations the admin portal in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users intermittently may be unable to run queries in Microsoft 365 Copilot and receive an error message
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users intermittently may have been unable to run queries in Microsoft 365 Copilot and received an error message.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to access email messages in Outlook Mobile when connecting to Exchange on‑premises
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to access email messages in Outlook Mobile when connecting to Exchange on‑premises.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may experience degraded file search results in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have experienced degraded file search results in Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat were delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have seen delays occur with several reports in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may experience issues accessing or using multiple Microsoft 365 services, including Microsoft Teams and Outlook
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have experienced intermittent delays in email delivery and access to Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins saw delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users in the United States may have been unable to access multiple Microsoft 365 services
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access multiple Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may experience errors or pages failing to load when accessing Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to load pages when accessing Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] A small subset of admins in North America and Brazil may be unable to access the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] A subset of admins in North America and Brazil may have been unable to access the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have seen stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may see stale or delayed Microsoft 365 Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may have seen stale or delayed Microsoft 365 Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have seen delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may be unable to access the Microsoft 365 web sign-in page and the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access the Microsoft 365 web sign-in page and the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Central US admins may be unable to access or experience delays accessing the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have been unable to access or experience delays accessing the Microsoft 365 admin center

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Some users may be unable to load Microsoft Viva Insights
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have been unable to load Microsoft Viva Insights.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' queries may fail with an error message in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' queries may have failed with an error in Copilot Chat.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users may be unable to install user targeted apps that have been made available in the Intune Company Portal
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users may have been unable to install user targeted apps that have been made available in the Intune Company Portal.

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have been unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and received an error.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Some admins may be unable to access Activity Explorer in the Microsoft Purview portal
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Admins may have been unable to access Activity Explorer in the Microsoft Purview portal.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Most users’ prompts in GPT 5.4 Think Deeper mode in Microsoft 365 Copilot may return a failure response
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users’ prompts in GPT 5.4 Think Deeper mode in Microsoft 365 Copilot may have returned a failure response.
